parsed_output.justification: Matt (Seer) and Mike (Robber) have mutually confirming stories, as Matt claims to have seen Mike as the Robber and Mike admits to being the Robber. Alana's claim as Insomniac fits into the narrative, whereas Mitchell's claim as Troublemaker is unverified and he exhibits suspicious behavior by being overly eager to be voted out. If a Werewolf is present, Mitchell is the most likely candidate as the other three players' roles are consistent with one another.
